nasb.text: So he removed on that day the striped and spotted male goats and all the speckled and spotted female goats, every one with white in it, and all the black ones among the sheep, and gave them into the care of his sons.

esv.text: But that day Laban removed the male goats that were striped and spotted, and all the female goats that were speckled and spotted, every one that had white on it, and every lamb that was black, and put them in the charge of his sons.

cnv.text: 當日，拉班把有條紋和有斑點的公山羊、有斑點和有白紋的母山羊，以及所有黑色的綿羊，都挑出來交在自己的眾子手裡。

ccb.text: 当天，拉班把有条纹或斑点的公山羊以及有斑点或夹杂白纹的母山羊，连同黑色的绵羊都挑出来，交给自己的儿子们看管。

csbs.text: 然而就在那一天，拉班挑出了有纹、有斑的公山羊，以及全部有点、有斑和掺杂白色的母山羊，还有全部黑色的绵羊羔，都交在自己儿子们的手中；
